prompt: Assess lifecycle state, percent complete, defects, and remaining work.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is E-201 EMT bending & installation within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.2 Raceway. The observed field condition is: improper coupling engagement. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors NEC Art. 358, Ch. 9 (fill). Treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.
title: T2 E-201 Progress assessment
